hooks.command:
python3 -c "
import sys, json, os
try:
    data = json.load(sys.stdin)
    fp = data.get('tool_input', {}).get('file_path', '')
    if fp and os.path.exists(fp) and fp.endswith(('.py', '.md')) and not fp.endswith('CLAUDE.md'):
        txt = open(fp, encoding='utf-8').read()
        if '\u6790' in txt:
            import re
            lines = txt.splitlines()
            hits = [(i+1, l) for i, l in enumerate(lines) if '\u6790' in l]
            print(f'[Hook] \u26a0\ufe0f \u6790(U+6790 CJK) \uac10\uc9c0: {fp}')
            for ln, l in hits:
                print(f'  line {ln}: {l.strip()}')
            print('[Hook] \ubd84\u6790 \u2192 \ubd84\uc11d (\uc11d=U+C11D \ud55c\uae00)\uc73c\ub85c \uc218\uc815 \ud544\uc694')
            sys.exit(2)
except Exception:
    pass
"
